name: last30days-skill
description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
readmeExcerpt:
# /last30days


**An AI agent-led search engine scored by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.** This README tracks the current v3 pipeline. The runtime skill spec lives in [skills/last30days/SKILL.md](skills/last30days/SKILL.md), which is the source of truth for the latest command and setup behavior. **Claude Code (recommended — auto-updates via marketplace):** ``` /plugin marketplace add mvanhorn/last30days-skill /plugin install last30days ``` **Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, or any of 50+ [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) hosts:** ``` npx skills add mvanhorn/last30days-skill -g ``` (`-g` installs globally for your user, available across all projects. Drop it to scope per-project.) More install options (claude.ai web, OpenClaw, manual) in the [Install](#install) section below. Zero config. Reddit, HN, Polymarket, and GitHub work immediately. Run it once and the setup wizard unlocks X, YouTube, TikTok, and more in 30 seconds. --- Reddit upvotes. X likes. YouTube transcripts. TikTok engagement. Polymarket odds backed by real money and insider information. That's millions of people voting with their attention and their wallets every day. /last30days searches all of it in parallel, scores it by what real people actually engage with, and an AI agent judge synthesizes it into one brief. Google aggregates editors. /last30days searches people. You can't get this search anywhere else because no single AI has access to all of it. Google search doesn't touch Reddit comments or X posts. ChatGPT has a deal with Reddit but can't search X or TikTok. Gemini has YouTube but not Reddit. Claude has none of them natively. Each platform is a walled garden with its own API, its own tokens, its own auth. But you can bring your own keys and browser sessions, and suddenly an AI agent can search all of them at once, score them against each other, and tell you what actually matters. That's the unlock. Not one better search engine. A dozen disconnected platforms, bridged by an agent. ``` /last30days Peter Steinberger ``` You have a meeting tomorrow. You Google them. You get their LinkedIn from 2023. /last30days gives you what they're actually doing this month: joined OpenAI to work on Codex, fighting Anthropic's ban on third-party agents, shipping 23 PRs at 85% merge rate, building "LobsterOS" for cross-device agent control, and r/ClaudeCode hit 569 upvotes debating whether he's a hero or "insufferable." Scattered

analysis.oneLine: last30days-skill 是一个面向 AI 编程工作流的规则与提示词资产，适合用于提升 Claude Code 或同类编码 Agent 的执行稳定性。
analysis.problem: AI 编程工具容易在上下文、测试、回滚和任务边界上犯重复错误，需要可复用的工程约束
analysis.audience: 使用 AI 编程的开发者、技术负责人、希望建立团队级 AI 编码规范的小团队
detailParagraphs: last30days-skill 更准确地说是一个面向 AI 编程工作流的规则与提示词资产，而不是一个只因为短期热度上榜的仓库。对国内用户来说，判断重点不应停留在 README 的自我描述，而要看它是否能解决一个真实、可复用、可持续维护的工作流问题：AI 编程工具容易在上下文、测试、回滚和任务边界上犯重复错误，需要可复用的工程约束。
如果把它放进实际使用场景，last30days-skill 的价值主要来自提升 Claude Code 或同类编码 Agent 的执行稳定性。当前 Star 约 42,042，说明它已经具备一定社区关注度，但商业用户更需要继续验证三件事：是否能嵌入现有业务流程，是否能由团队基于 Python 技术栈持续维护，以及是否能形成稳定交付而不是一次性 Demo。
从商业化和私有化角度看，它更像知识资产而非软件系统，价值在于能否转化为团队开发规范、评审清单或定制化 Agent 工作流。无需复杂部署，但需要根据团队技术栈、代码规范和安全要求改写后才能稳定使用。当前最需要警惕的是：风险在于规则泛化过度，直接复制可能不适合本地项目；需要结合真实仓库测试迭代。因此建议先用一个小范围真实任务做部署测试，再决定它适合作为内部工具、客户方案组件，还是仅作为趋势观察样本。
scenarios: 团队 AI 编码规范
analysis.interpretation: last30days-skill 的评估重点是产品形态、工程成熟度和场景适配，而不是 README 文案本身。对付费信息服务用户来说，它的价值在于帮助快速判断是否值得投入一次部署验证、是否有二次开发空间、是否能成为降本增效工具或商业服务组件。
analysis.installRequirements: 通常需要 Python 相关运行环境，具体版本以官方 README 为准。
analysis.deployment: 无需复杂部署，但需要根据团队技术栈、代码规范和安全要求改写后才能稳定使用。暂未识别出明确 Docker Compose 部署路径，私有化部署成本需要进一步评估。
analysis.commercialValue: 它更像知识资产而非软件系统，价值在于能否转化为团队开发规范、评审清单或定制化 Agent 工作流；由于关注度较高，适合作为竞品研究、工具选型或方案组件候选。
analysis.efficiencyValue: 如果项目与现有工作流匹配，效率价值主要体现在提升 Claude Code 或同类编码 Agent 的执行稳定性，并减少从零选型和重复开发的时间。
analysis.learningValue: 适合学习以 Python 为主的技术栈下同类项目的产品组织、工程结构、README 表达和社区反馈。
analysis.reuseValue: 具备二次开发可能，但需要结合许可证、代码结构、依赖复杂度、接口稳定性和维护节奏判断。
analysis.chinaNotes: 国内使用时要重点检查 GitHub、镜像源、模型服务、第三方 API 和 Docker 镜像访问稳定性。
analysis.risk: 风险在于规则泛化过度，直接复制可能不适合本地项目；需要结合真实仓库测试迭代。
